category_sources: source_facts.description says experimental optional static type checker for Python; official homepage https://mypy-lang.org/ describes static typing/type checking for Python.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mypy; official homepage https://mypy-lang.org/ and docs https://mypy.readthedocs.io/ use mypy.
docs_sources: Dedicated official documentation is hosted at https://mypy.readthedocs.io/; official homepage links and describes the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; Read the Docs project metadata lists repository https://github.com/python/mypy; official project ecosystem uses that GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation describe mypy as a Python static type checker with CLI tools such as mypy and dmypy.
